ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "total_prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the flight belongs to */,
  "flight_name" TEXT /* Name of the flight */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flight */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the flight */,
  "tee_time" TEXT /* Tee time for the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "handicap" REAL /* Handicap of the player */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the score belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the score belongs to */,
  "score_front" INTEGER /* Front score of the player */,
  "score_back" INTEGER /* Back score of the player */,
  "gross_score" INTEGER /* Gross score of the player */,
  "net_score" INTEGER /* Net score of the player */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the standing belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the standing belongs to */,
  "points" REAL /* Points earned by the player */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Earnings of the player */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the player in the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, player, sponsor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the sponsor belongs to */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the sponsor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsor */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the rule belongs to */,
  "rule_text" TEXT /* Text of the rule */,
  "min_ranking" INTEGER /* Minimum ranking required for payout */,
  "max_ranking" INTEGER /* Maximum ranking eligible for payout */,
  "payout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total prize money paid out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_rules_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the rule belongs to */,
  "rule_text" TEXT /* Text of the rule */,
  "min_ranking" INTEGER /* Minimum ranking required for points */,
  "max_ranking" INTEGER /* Maximum ranking eligible for points */,
  "points_awarded" INTEGER /* Number of points awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_rules_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_flights" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_sponsors" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "sponsor_id")
)
